title: Hephaestus v0.6 Executive Packet
description: Bounded input for T4 (human or autonomous). Generated by Orchestrator after T3 Arbiter decision. Prevents duplicate reasoning / context bloat — T4 does not re-read the full tick history.

schema_version.description: Schema version number. Bumped on breaking changes per README schema-bump procedure.

tick_id.description: Tick id this packet was generated for.

objective.description: The goal being pursued in this tick (one-line summary).

active_frame.description: The framing the system is currently operating under (a brief prose). Determines what counts as on-topic for the next move.

relevant_beliefs.description: Beliefs that bear on the objective. May be empty.

suspect_beliefs.description: Beliefs flagged MARK_SUSPECT by Reflector or Challenger. T4 should re-examine these.

hypothesis.description: The active hypothesis (text) for this tick.

worker_result.description: If a worker was dispatched, the worker's outcome (free-form structured).

praxis_verdict.description: Praxis (eval) verdict for the worker's output.

t2_objection.description: T2 (Challenger) objection text. Empty if T2 had no objection.

t3_adjudication.description: T3 (Arbiter) adjudication text. Resolves T1 vs T2.

unresolved_uncertainties.description: Items the system could not resolve this tick and that T4 should weigh.

expected_gain.description: Self-estimated gain of the proposed action. Used by T4 fast-path/full-synthesis routing.

blast_radius.description: Self-estimated blast radius. Used to gate AFK autonomy (A-1 #76).

candidate_scope.description: Free-form description of the candidate's scope. Becomes candidate.expected_delta.scope (BE-1 #82).

shadow_plan.description: How to SHADOW the candidate (BE-1 #82 shadow_plan).

rollback_plan.description: How to rollback. From BE-3 (#86) snapshot manifest.

historical_precedents.description: From BE-6 (#84) precedent memory. Past cases with similar signatures.
